overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from an open plaza with stairs to a covered parking area under an overpass, then into a narrow neon-lit commercial street. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with dense atmospheric fog and artificial neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy urban plaza at night, with the camera walking forward toward a wide set of concrete stairs. Street lights pierce through the dense fog, and palm trees are visible on the right. The camera approaches and begins ascending the stairs toward a large brutalist building, with a few pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking area beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: passes food vendor stall and enters covered parking area under concrete overpass
turns slightly right while walking through parking lot with abandoned cars

agents.ego_description: walking past a food vendor and through a parking area under a massive concrete overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a semi-covered parking area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The camera passes a small food vendor stall on the left where people are sitting, then moves through a parking lot with abandoned cars and trash dumpsters. The environment is darker and more enclosed, with the foggy sky mostly blocked by the overhead highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with neon signage

events.description: enters narrow street lined with neon signs and commercial storefronts
continues walking while approaching a group of pedestrians ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow neon-lit street, passing other pedestrians and following a group ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: building with illuminated 'Clarendon' signage above a shuttered storefront
shops with bright red and purple neon lights and digital displays
large illuminated advertisement showing a samurai character
confined pedestrian walkway between tall buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow commercial street densely packed with neon signage. The camera walks past the 'Clarendon' building and various storefronts with bright red and purple neon lights. A large digital billboard is visible on the right. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and the camera follows a small group walking ahead through the foggy, neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, foggy urban plaza into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched corridors of a commercial district. It begins by walking through a dense mist toward a wide set of concrete stairs, passing palm trees and street lights before ascending toward a massive brutalist building. As the camera moves forward, the open air shifts into a darker, enclosed parking area beneath a heavy concrete overpass, passing a small food stall and abandoned cars scattered among trash dumpsters. The scene then opens into a narrow commercial street where the gray fog is overtaken by vibrant red and purple neon signage and large digital billboards. Finally, the camera follows a group of pedestrians past the Clarendon building, moving deeper into the crowded, glowing corridor of the city.
